rationale: Educ. Code §43.013 governs Travis County district court jurisdiction over permanent school fund bond suits. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The district courts of Travis County have jurisdiction of any suit on bonds or obligations belonging to the permanent school fund, or purchased therewith, concurrent with that of any other court having jurisdiction in the case.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change.
